title: Turning off Notifications when Items and Subitems are Archived
excerpt:
Description
I have automations set to Archive Items and Sub-Items when they Status is changed to complete. When an item is complete and hence archived, it sends a notification out of everyone who has access to the board …

posts.author: Mikhaila (Mikhaila Fechushak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have automations set to Archive Items and Sub-Items when they Status is changed to complete. When an item is complete and hence archived, it sends a notification out of everyone who has access to the board that the item has been archived. I even receive a notification that says I archived the item when I do it myself. I have gone through the custom fields of notifications as well as checked to make sure the automations do not include the a “notify” command.

What are you trying to achieve

My goal is to minimize the number of notifications so individuals don’t get overwhelmed are inclined less inclined to ignore them. Is there a way to turn this specific type of notification off?

posts.author: Fiona_D (Fiona Downie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need help with this too!
I want to have a clean-up of our account and archive old boards, but don’t want clients to be notified and absolutely clog up their emails.
The only thing I can think of is muting notifications for everyone on a board before archiving, but that will make the job so much longer!
